ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency where the candidate is running */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the constituency is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the state where the constituency is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the political party */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the party was registered */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the party */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the party */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the election year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the election year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the election year */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, by-election) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained by the candidate */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the candidate studied */,
  "year_of_completion" TEXT /* Year the candidate completed the degree */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the degree */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage marks obtained by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_education_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the candidate */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the candidate */,
  "source_of_funds" TEXT /* Source of the candidate's funds */,
  "date_of_declaration" TEXT /* Date the financial information was declared */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the candidate */,
  "expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_finances_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_criminal_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criminal case */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number assigned by the court */,
  "court" TEXT /* Court where the case is being heard */,
  "charge" TEXT /* Charge against the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., ongoing, acquitted, convicted) */,
  "date_filed" TEXT /* Date the case was filed */,
  "verdict" TEXT /* Verdict of the case */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Sentence given to the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_criminal_cases_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship with the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the family member */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_family_members_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_constituency_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election year */,
  "elected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the candidate was elected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_constituency_history_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_constituency_history_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_constituency_history_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_constituency_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election year */,
  "votes_obtained" INTEGER /* Number of votes obtained by the party */,
  "seats_won" INTEGER /* Number of seats won by the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_constituency_performance_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_constituency_performance_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_constituency_performance_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the candidate on the platform */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_social_media_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_manifesto" (
  "manifesto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manifesto record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "manifesto_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's manifesto */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the manifesto was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manifesto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_manifesto_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_public_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* Text of the public statement */,
  "date_made" TEXT /* Date the statement was made */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the statement was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_public_statements_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
